WhyItMatters: Identifies application consent, delegated permission, and high-interest OAuth scope activity that may indicate risky app access.
ReviewSteps: Review OAuth grants and consent activity.
Validate app publisher, app owner, consent source, and permissions.
Identify high-interest scopes such as offline_access, Mail.ReadWrite, Files.ReadWrite, and Directory.Read.All.
Confirm whether the app is business-approved.
Pivot to cloud activity performed by the app or user.
ExpectedResults: Rows may show consent activity, service principal changes, delegated permission grants, or app access events.
NoResultsMeaning: No OAuth or app consent telemetry was returned for the selected window.
RecommendedActions: Validate business justification for app permissions.
Remove or restrict risky grants after validation.
Review app consent governance and admin consent workflow.
